name: The Boys from Brazil
overview: Follow Holocaust survivor and Nazi hunter Yakov Liebermann across three decades from the immediate aftermath of World War II through the political turbulence of the 1970s in his lifelong crusade to bring Nazi fugitives to justice, a crusade that has cost him nearly everything.

trailers.title: The Boys from Brazil Trailer 2025 | Jeremy Strong | Shira Haas | Netflix | The Boys from Brazil 2025
